emails.body: FW: Work At Home Meeting John, what is the status of these todo's? Thanks. Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Work At Home Meeting
emails.body: RE: Work At Home Meeting Lynn, Remedy has been updated to give home office workers a high priority and to be assigned to Glenn or Robert when possible. Glenn did install a modem in Shirley's machine. There is still some issue with the CITRIX Server and VPN access, the solution center believes the problem is on the Road Runner side and Jean McFarland is working on it. Everyone is working from home with little to no problems despite the CITRIX issue. John Buchanan

emails.subject: RE: Work At Home Meeting
emails.body: John, thank you for the update. Sheila, just an FYI to keep you in the loop on working from home issues. Thanks. Lynn
